programmes.show_description: A millionaire is murdered, and his new wife is the prime suspect. But was the motive money, a crime of passion or both?
On the outside, they seemed to be the perfect couple. But when his wife of 35 years is found dead, dark secrets begin coming into the light.
A wife stabs her husband, almost 200 times. Was this self-defense from an abusive relationship or cold-blooded murder for money? The dramatic trial of Susan Wright.
His bizarre behavior left a trail of bodies. An in-depth look at the killings, investigations and trials that made eccentric millionaire Robert Durst a global obsession.
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
FL v. AILEEN WUORNOS
Rabi Fred Neulander was a pillar of his community - founder of a synagogue, a father and husband.  But secretly, he was an adulterer, capable of hiring a hitman to murder his own wife.
The disturbing case of Melanie McGuire, a fertility clinic nurse, shockingly accused of shooting her husband, dismembering his body and disposing of it in suitcases dumped into Chesapeake Bay.
Tyler Clementi and Dharun Ravi were new college roommates when Ravi secretly live streamed Tyler kissing another man. Soon after Tyler committed suicide and Ravi faced surprising criminal charges.
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.
Your Front Row Seat to Justice. Taking you beyond the headlines and into the courtroom, with in-depth legal reporting and expert analysis of the most important and compelling trials.

Every weekday night on Court TV, Vinnie Politan takes a deep dive into the True Crime stories that are captivating the nation. Now, you can catch the sharp analysis and insightful interviews.
Rabi Fred Neulander was a pillar of his community - founder of a synagogue, a father and husband.  But secretly, he was an adulterer, capable of hiring a hitman to murder his own wife.
The disturbing case of Melanie McGuire, a fertility clinic nurse, shockingly accused of shooting her husband, dismembering his body and disposing of it in suitcases dumped into Chesapeake Bay.
Tyler Clementi and Dharun Ravi were new college roommates when Ravi secretly live streamed Tyler kissing another man. Soon after Tyler committed suicide and Ravi faced surprising criminal charges.
The Witchcraft Triple Murder Trial. Did William Hartung kill his mother and two half-brothers in dark occult ritual? Or was his motive to murder his family much more basic... greed.
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.
The Killing Of Ahmad Arbery. Ahmad Arbery was out jogging when three white men assumed he was a burglar, chased him down and shot him multiple times.

programmes.show_name: Victim To Verdict Chaos In Kenosha
programmes.show_description: Kyle Rittenhouse shot and killed two people and maimed a third during a Black Lives Matter protest in Kenosha, Wisconsin.

programmes.show_name: Victim To Verdict A Clown At The Door
programmes.show_description: A clown carrying balloons and a basket of flowers shot and killed Marlene Warren when she opened her front door in 1990.
